business_ideas.idea: Airchat voice-first social media platform (Naval's new product)
AI tutor service at premium hourly rate for staying current with AI trends
Early-stage platform arbitrage by joining pre-launch social platforms
Expert consultation networks connecting executives with industry advisors

predictions.text: Most new podcasts won't sustain; shelf space for listeners is limited (3-5 per person)
Airchat could succeed if Naval's curation continues; presents early-mover opportunity
Best podcast winners in each category will consolidate audience over time
